slot-1.name: Cyberpunk Neon Noir
slot-1.prompt: Ultra-detailed cyberpunk city at night. Heavy rain with neon reflections pooling on wet streets. Flying cars weaving between massive skyscrapers. Dramatic pink and teal volumetric lighting. Blade Runner 2049 aesthetic. Atmospheric fog and light rays through tall buildings. Cinematic masterpiece photorealistic 8K.

slot-2.name: Epic Fantasy Landscape
slot-2.prompt: Epic fantasy landscape with ancient stone ruins on dramatic clifftop overlooking magical valley. Volumetric god rays breaking through storm clouds. Glowing magical elements in environment. Rich warm and cool color contrast. Sweeping cinematic composition. Tolkien meets Studio Ghibli aesthetic. Ultra-detailed painterly realism 8K.

slot-3.name: Luxury Perfume Shot
slot-3.prompt: Hyper-realistic commercial studio product photography of a luxury perfume bottle. Soft dramatic key light with subtle rim lighting. Pure white background. Intricate glass detail catching the light beautifully. High-end magazine advertisement quality. Apple and Chanel level product photography. 4K ultra-sharp professional lighting.

slot-4.name: Cinematic Portrait
slot-4.prompt: Ultra-cinematic portrait with dramatic Hollywood-style lighting. ARRI Alexa camera aesthetic, anamorphic lens flares, volumetric light rays. Deep shadow contrast with warm key light. Film grain texture. Teal and orange color grade. Subject looks directly into camera with intense powerful expression. 8K cinematic quality.
